---
title: "Geomarketing avec R - Session 2 (Isochrone 10 min + Features, SIRENE 2026)"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
  pdf_document: default
  html_notebook: default
---
```{r,message=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(sf)
library(readr)
library(readxl)
library(tmap)
library(tmaptools)

cours_dir_candidates <- c("Cours", ".", "..")
cours_dir <- cours_dir_candidates[
  file.exists(file.path(cours_dir_candidates, "data", "raw", "dataseed-sirene-1.shp"))
][1]
if (is.na(cours_dir)) {
  stop("Dossier Cours/data/raw introuvable depuis: ", getwd())
}
raw_dir <- file.path(cours_dir, "data", "raw")
processed_dir <- file.path(cours_dir, "data", "processed")
dir.create(processed_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
message("Dossier Cours utilise: ", cours_dir)

# Si TRUE, on stoppe le rendu quand aucun code 47.11* n'est trouve dans la zone.
strict_supermarket_filter <- TRUE

otp_available <- requireNamespace("opentripplanner", quietly = TRUE)
if (!otp_available) {
  otp_pkg <- file.path(raw_dir, "opentripplanner_0.4.0.tar.gz")
  if (file.exists(otp_pkg)) {
    tryCatch(
      {
        install.packages(otp_pkg, repos = NULL, type = "source")
        otp_available <- requireNamespace("opentripplanner", quietly = TRUE)
      },
      error = function(e) {
        message("Installation locale opentripplanner impossible: ", conditionMessage(e))
      }
    )
  }
}

if (otp_available) {
  library(opentripplanner)
} else {
  message("opentripplanner indisponible: sections OTP/isochrones ignorees.")
}
```


```{r}
# Chargement des données locales (mêmes sources que test.Rmd)
iris_shp <- st_read(
  dsn = raw_dir,
  layer = "georef-france-iris-millesime"
)

sirene_layer <- "dataseed-sirene-1"
sirene_dsn_candidates <- c(file.path(cours_dir, "data", "actif"), raw_dir)
sirene_dsn <- sirene_dsn_candidates[
  file.exists(file.path(sirene_dsn_candidates, paste0(sirene_layer, ".shp")))
][1]
if (is.na(sirene_dsn)) {
  stop("Aucune source SIRENE trouvee pour ", sirene_layer, " dans data/actif ou data/raw.")
}
message("Source SIRENE utilisee: ", sirene_dsn, "/", sirene_layer, ".shp")

sirene_shp <- st_read(
  dsn = sirene_dsn,
  layer = sirene_layer
)

# Normalisation des noms de colonnes SIRENE 2026 vers le schema attendu.
if (!"siret" %in% colnames(sirene_shp) && "SIRET" %in% colnames(sirene_shp)) {
  sirene_shp <- sirene_shp %>% rename(siret = SIRET)
}
if (!"libellecomm" %in% colnames(sirene_shp) && "Commune_de_" %in% colnames(sirene_shp)) {
  sirene_shp <- sirene_shp %>% rename(libellecomm = Commune_de_)
}
if (!"etatadminis" %in% colnames(sirene_shp) && "Etat_admini" %in% colnames(sirene_shp)) {
  sirene_shp <- sirene_shp %>% rename(etatadminis = Etat_admini)
}
if (!"enseigne1et" %in% colnames(sirene_shp) && "Enseigne_de" %in% colnames(sirene_shp)) {
  sirene_shp <- sirene_shp %>% rename(enseigne1et = Enseigne_de)
}
if (!"trancheeffe.2" %in% colnames(sirene_shp) && "Tranche_de_.2" %in% colnames(sirene_shp)) {
  sirene_shp <- sirene_shp %>% rename(trancheeffe.2 = Tranche_de_.2)
}
if (!"activitepri.1" %in% colnames(sirene_shp) && "Activite_pr.1" %in% colnames(sirene_shp)) {
  sirene_shp <- sirene_shp %>% rename(activitepri.1 = Activite_pr.1)
}
if (!"activitepri.2" %in% colnames(sirene_shp) && "Activite_pr.2" %in% colnames(sirene_shp)) {
  sirene_shp <- sirene_shp %>% rename(activitepri.2 = Activite_pr.2)
}
if (!"activitepri" %in% colnames(sirene_shp) && "Activite_pr" %in% colnames(sirene_shp)) {
  sirene_shp <- sirene_shp %>% rename(activitepri = Activite_pr)
}

clean_chr <- function(x) {
  x <- trimws(as.character(x))
  x[x %in% c("", "NA", "N/A", "NULL", "[ND]", "ND", "Missing", "MISSING", "SANS ENSEIGNE")] <- NA_character_
  x
}

if (!"enseigne2et" %in% colnames(sirene_shp)) {
  if ("Enseigne_de.1" %in% colnames(sirene_shp)) {
    sirene_shp <- sirene_shp %>% rename(enseigne2et = Enseigne_de.1)
  } else {
    sirene_shp$enseigne2et <- NA_character_
  }
}
if (!"enseigne3et" %in% colnames(sirene_shp)) {
  if ("Enseigne_de.2" %in% colnames(sirene_shp)) {
    sirene_shp <- sirene_shp %>% rename(enseigne3et = Enseigne_de.2)
  } else {
    sirene_shp$enseigne3et <- NA_character_
  }
}
if (!"denominatio" %in% colnames(sirene_shp)) {
  if ("Denominatio" %in% colnames(sirene_shp)) {
    sirene_shp <- sirene_shp %>% rename(denominatio = Denominatio)
  } else {
    sirene_shp$denominatio <- NA_character_
  }
}

sirene_shp$enseigne_display <- dplyr::coalesce(
  clean_chr(sirene_shp$enseigne1et),
  clean_chr(sirene_shp$enseigne2et),
  clean_chr(sirene_shp$enseigne3et),
  clean_chr(sirene_shp$denominatio),
  as.character(sirene_shp$siret)
)
# On remplace la colonne utilisee dans les cartes pour eviter les points sans enseigne.
sirene_shp$enseigne1et <- sirene_shp$enseigne_display
sirene_shp$enseigne1et <- ifelse(
  grepl("^[0-9]{14}$", as.character(sirene_shp$enseigne1et)),
  "ENSEIGNE_INCONNUE",
  as.character(sirene_shp$enseigne1et)
)

required_sirene_cols <- c("siret", "libellecomm", "etatadminis", "enseigne1et", "trancheeffe.2")
missing_sirene_cols <- setdiff(required_sirene_cols, colnames(sirene_shp))
if (length(missing_sirene_cols) > 0) {
  stop("Colonnes SIRENE manquantes apres normalisation: ", paste(missing_sirene_cols, collapse = ", "))
}
activity_cols <- c("activitepri.1", "activitepri.2", "activitepri")
activity_cols <- activity_cols[activity_cols %in% colnames(sirene_shp)]
if (length(activity_cols) == 0) {
  stop("Aucune colonne d'activite exploitable dans la source SIRENE 2026.")
}

iris_data <- read_excel(file.path(raw_dir, "iris_isere.xlsx"))

# Zone d'étude: Grenoble + communes nord
sirene_coms <- c(
  "GRENOBLE", "MEYLAN", "LA TRONCHE",
  "CORENC", "SAINT-MARTIN-LE-VINOUX", "SAINT-EGREVE"
)
iris_coms <- c(
  "Grenoble", "Meylan", "La Tronche",
  "Corenc", "Saint-Martin-le-Vinoux", "Saint-Égrève"
)

# Supermarches / hypermarches: classes NAF 47.11* (ex: 47.11D, 47.11F)
is_supermarket <- Reduce(
  `|`,
  lapply(
    activity_cols,
    function(col) {
      x <- as.character(sirene_shp[[col]])
      !is.na(x) & startsWith(x, "47.11")
    }
  )
)

sirene_zone_active <- sirene_shp %>%
  mutate(
    libellecomm_u = toupper(trimws(as.character(libellecomm))),
    etatadminis_u = toupper(trimws(as.character(etatadminis)))
  ) %>%
  filter(
    libellecomm_u %in% sirene_coms,
    etatadminis_u %in% c("ACTIF", "A")
  )

sirene_grenoble <- sirene_shp %>%
  mutate(
    libellecomm_u = toupper(trimws(as.character(libellecomm))),
    etatadminis_u = toupper(trimws(as.character(etatadminis)))
  ) %>%
  filter(
    libellecomm_u %in% sirene_coms,
    etatadminis_u %in% c("ACTIF", "A"),
    is_supermarket
  )
iris_grenoble <- iris_shp %>%
  filter(com_name %in% iris_coms)

# OTP ne supporte pas les geometries vides dans fromPlace.
empty_idx <- which(st_is_empty(sirene_grenoble))
if (length(empty_idx) > 0) {
  message("Points de vente retires (geometry vide): ", length(empty_idx))
  sirene_grenoble <- sirene_grenoble[-empty_idx, ]
}
if (nrow(sirene_grenoble) == 0) {
  # Fallback intelligent: si la source 2026 ne contient aucun 47.11* dans la zone,
  # on tente automatiquement dataseed-sirene-2 avant de stopper.
  alt_layer <- "dataseed-sirene-2"
  alt_dsn <- sirene_dsn_candidates[
    file.exists(file.path(sirene_dsn_candidates, paste0(alt_layer, ".shp")))
  ][1]

  if (!is.na(alt_dsn)) {
    message(
      "Aucun 47.11* trouve dans ", sirene_layer,
      ". Tentative automatique avec ", alt_layer, "."
    )

    alt_shp <- st_read(dsn = alt_dsn, layer = alt_layer)

    if (!"siret" %in% colnames(alt_shp) && "SIRET" %in% colnames(alt_shp)) {
      alt_shp <- alt_shp %>% rename(siret = SIRET)
    }
    if (!"libellecomm" %in% colnames(alt_shp) && "Commune_de_" %in% colnames(alt_shp)) {
      alt_shp <- alt_shp %>% rename(libellecomm = Commune_de_)
    }
    if (!"etatadminis" %in% colnames(alt_shp) && "Etat_admini" %in% colnames(alt_shp)) {
      alt_shp <- alt_shp %>% rename(etatadminis = Etat_admini)
    }
    if (!"enseigne1et" %in% colnames(alt_shp) && "Enseigne_de" %in% colnames(alt_shp)) {
      alt_shp <- alt_shp %>% rename(enseigne1et = Enseigne_de)
    }
    if (!"trancheeffe.2" %in% colnames(alt_shp) && "Tranche_de_.2" %in% colnames(alt_shp)) {
      alt_shp <- alt_shp %>% rename(trancheeffe.2 = Tranche_de_.2)
    }
    if (!"activitepri.1" %in% colnames(alt_shp) && "Activite_pr.1" %in% colnames(alt_shp)) {
      alt_shp <- alt_shp %>% rename(activitepri.1 = Activite_pr.1)
    }
    if (!"activitepri.2" %in% colnames(alt_shp) && "Activite_pr.2" %in% colnames(alt_shp)) {
      alt_shp <- alt_shp %>% rename(activitepri.2 = Activite_pr.2)
    }
    if (!"activitepri" %in% colnames(alt_shp) && "Activite_pr" %in% colnames(alt_shp)) {
      alt_shp <- alt_shp %>% rename(activitepri = Activite_pr)
    }
    if (!"enseigne2et" %in% colnames(alt_shp)) {
      if ("Enseigne_de.1" %in% colnames(alt_shp)) {
        alt_shp <- alt_shp %>% rename(enseigne2et = Enseigne_de.1)
      } else {
        alt_shp$enseigne2et <- NA_character_
      }
    }
    if (!"enseigne3et" %in% colnames(alt_shp)) {
      if ("Enseigne_de.2" %in% colnames(alt_shp)) {
        alt_shp <- alt_shp %>% rename(enseigne3et = Enseigne_de.2)
      } else {
        alt_shp$enseigne3et <- NA_character_
      }
    }
    if (!"denominatio" %in% colnames(alt_shp)) {
      if ("Denominatio" %in% colnames(alt_shp)) {
        alt_shp <- alt_shp %>% rename(denominatio = Denominatio)
      } else {
        alt_shp$denominatio <- NA_character_
      }
    }

    alt_shp$enseigne_display <- dplyr::coalesce(
      clean_chr(alt_shp$enseigne1et),
      clean_chr(alt_shp$enseigne2et),
      clean_chr(alt_shp$enseigne3et),
      clean_chr(alt_shp$denominatio),
      as.character(alt_shp$siret)
    )
    alt_shp$enseigne1et <- alt_shp$enseigne_display
    alt_shp$enseigne1et <- ifelse(
      grepl("^[0-9]{14}$", as.character(alt_shp$enseigne1et)),
      "ENSEIGNE_INCONNUE",
      as.character(alt_shp$enseigne1et)
    )

    alt_activity_cols <- c("activitepri.1", "activitepri.2", "activitepri")
    alt_activity_cols <- alt_activity_cols[alt_activity_cols %in% colnames(alt_shp)]

    if (length(alt_activity_cols) > 0) {
      alt_is_supermarket <- Reduce(
        `|`,
        lapply(
          alt_activity_cols,
          function(col) {
            x <- as.character(alt_shp[[col]])
            !is.na(x) & startsWith(x, "47.11")
          }
        )
      )

      alt_zone_active <- alt_shp %>%
        mutate(
          libellecomm_u = toupper(trimws(as.character(libellecomm))),
          etatadminis_u = toupper(trimws(as.character(etatadminis)))
        ) %>%
        filter(
          libellecomm_u %in% sirene_coms,
          etatadminis_u %in% c("ACTIF", "A")
        )

      alt_grenoble <- alt_shp %>%
        mutate(
          libellecomm_u = toupper(trimws(as.character(libellecomm))),
          etatadminis_u = toupper(trimws(as.character(etatadminis)))
        ) %>%
        filter(
          libellecomm_u %in% sirene_coms,
          etatadminis_u %in% c("ACTIF", "A"),
          alt_is_supermarket
        )

      if (nrow(alt_grenoble) > 0) {
        message(
          "Bascule reussie: ", alt_layer, " (", nrow(alt_grenoble),
          " supermarches/hypermarches 47.11* dans la zone)."
        )
        sirene_layer <- alt_layer
        sirene_dsn <- alt_dsn
        sirene_shp <- alt_shp
        activity_cols <- alt_activity_cols
        is_supermarket <- alt_is_supermarket
        sirene_zone_active <- alt_zone_active
        sirene_grenoble <- alt_grenoble
      }
    }
  }
}

if (nrow(sirene_grenoble) == 0) {
  zone_active_total <- nrow(sirene_zone_active)
  if (strict_supermarket_filter) {
    stop(
      "Aucun supermarche 47.11* trouve dans la zone (meme apres tentative fallback). ",
      "Etablissements actifs dans la zone (toutes activites): ",
      zone_active_total
    )
  } else {
    message(
      "Aucun supermarche 47.11* trouve dans la zone. ",
      "Bascule sur tous les etablissements actifs (n = ", zone_active_total, ")."
    )
    sirene_grenoble <- sirene_zone_active
  }
}
```
```{r}
# Préparation des variables IRIS (même logique que test.Rmd)
colnames(iris_grenoble)[20] <- "CODE_IRIS"

iris_data$nb_residence_princ <- iris_data$Res_princ_30_moins_40_m2 +
  iris_data$Res_princ_40_moins_60_m2 +
  iris_data$Res_princ_60_moins_80_m2 +
  iris_data$Res_princ_80_moins_100_m2 +
  iris_data$Res_princ_100_moins_120_m2

vars_to_keep <- c(
  "CODE_IRIS",
  "1er_quartile_euro", "3e_quartile_euro",
  "Actifs_15-64_ans2", "Pop_15-64_ans",
  "Delta_Pop_20-64_ans", "nb_residence_princ",
  "Mediane_euro", "Menages_une_voiture", "Menages_1_personne",
  "Men_fam_princ_Couple_enfant_s", "Pop_15_ansplus_Cadres_Prof_intel_sup",
  "Pop_15_ansplus_Ouvriers", "Pop_15_ansplus_Retraites",
  "Actif_occ_15_ansplus_voiture_camion", "Actif_occ_15_ansplus_transport_commun"
)
```


```{r}
iris_grenoble <- merge(
  iris_grenoble,
  iris_data[, vars_to_keep],
  by = "CODE_IRIS",
  all.x = TRUE
)
```
```{r}
iris_grenoble <- iris_grenoble %>%
  rename(
    premier_quartile_revenu = `1er_quartile_euro`,
    troisieme_quartile_revenu = `3e_quartile_euro`,
    Actif_total = `Actifs_15-64_ans2`,
    Pop_15_64 = `Pop_15-64_ans`,
    Delta_pop_20_64ans = `Delta_Pop_20-64_ans`,
    Nb_residence_principale = nb_residence_princ
  )
```
```{r}
iris_grenoble <- iris_grenoble %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      c(
        premier_quartile_revenu,
        troisieme_quartile_revenu,
        Actif_total,
        Pop_15_64,
        Delta_pop_20_64ans,
        Nb_residence_principale,
        Mediane_euro,
        Menages_une_voiture,
        Menages_1_personne,
        Men_fam_princ_Couple_enfant_s,
        Pop_15_ansplus_Cadres_Prof_intel_sup,
        Pop_15_ansplus_Ouvriers,
        Pop_15_ansplus_Retraites,
        Actif_occ_15_ansplus_voiture_camion,
        Actif_occ_15_ansplus_transport_commun
      ),
      ~ na_if(., 0)
    )
  )

st_crs(sirene_grenoble)
```
```{r}
# Buffer de 500 m autour des supermarchés
sirene_grenoble_l93 <- st_transform(sirene_grenoble, 2154)
buffer <- st_buffer(sirene_grenoble_l93, 500)
buffer <- st_transform(buffer, st_crs(iris_grenoble))
st_trbuffer <- buffer
```
```{r}
if (!exists("iris_grenoble") || !exists("sirene_grenoble") || !exists("buffer")) {
  stop("Executez d'abord les chunks de chargement/preparation des donnees.")
}
tmap_mode("view")
tm_shape(iris_grenoble) +
  tm_text(text = "iris_name", size = 0.8) +
  tm_polygons(
    "Pop_15_64",
    alpha = 0.5,
    style = "pretty",
    id = "iris_name",
    title = "Population (15-64 ans)"
  ) +
  tm_shape(buffer) +
  tm_borders("chartreuse3", lwd = 3) +
  tm_shape(sirene_grenoble) +
  tm_dots(
    "enseigne1et",
    legend.show = TRUE,
    title = "Enseigne",
    id = "enseigne1et",
    popup.vars = "trancheeffe.2",
    alpha = 0.3
  ) +
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE)
```
```{r}
tm_shape(iris_grenoble) +
  tm_text(text = "iris_name", size = 0.8) +
  tm_polygons(
    "Pop_15_64",
    alpha = 0.5,
    style = "pretty",
    id = "iris_name",
    title = "Population (15-64 ans)"
  ) +
  tm_shape(buffer) +
  tm_polygons("enseigne1et", legend.show = FALSE, id = "enseigne1et", alpha = 0.5) +
  tm_shape(sirene_grenoble) +
  tm_dots(
    "enseigne1et",
    legend.show = TRUE,
    title = "Enseigne",
    id = "enseigne1et",
    popup.vars = "trancheeffe.2",
    alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE)
```

```{r,results='hide',message=FALSE, eval=otp_available}

local_otp_jar <- file.path(cours_dir, "data", "otp-1.5.0-shaded.jar")
path_otp <- if (file.exists(local_otp_jar)) local_otp_jar else otp_dl_jar()
  
if (!exists("otpcon")) {
  path_data <- file.path(cours_dir, "data")
  graph_dir <- file.path(path_data, "graphs", "default")

  if (!dir.exists(graph_dir)) {
    dir.create(graph_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  }

  graph_obj_src <- file.path(path_data, "Graph.obj")
  graph_obj_dst <- file.path(graph_dir, "Graph.obj")
  if (!file.exists(graph_obj_dst) && file.exists(graph_obj_src)) {
    file.copy(graph_obj_src, graph_obj_dst)
  }
  if (!file.exists(graph_obj_dst)) {
    
    message("Graph.obj introuvable. Attendu dans ", graph_obj_src, " ou ", graph_obj_dst)
    
    # Construction de Graph.obj
    log <- otp_build_graph(otp = path_otp,
                           dir = path_data,memory=8000)
  }


  # Lance OTP uniquement si aucune connexion n'est deja active.
  otpcon <- tryCatch(otp_connect(), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(otpcon)) {
    log1 <- otp_setup(otp = path_otp, dir = path_data)
    otpcon <- otp_connect()
  }
}
```


```{r,results='hide', eval=otp_available}
iso <- otp_isochrone(
  otpcon,
  fromPlace = sirene_grenoble,
  fromID = sirene_grenoble$siret,
  mode = c("WALK", "TRANSIT"),
  maxWalkDistance = 1500,
  date_time = as.POSIXct(strptime("2026-02-18 08:35", "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")),
  cutoffSec = c(6, 8, 10, 12) * 60
)
colnames(iso)[3] <- "siret"

ref_enseigne <- sirene_grenoble %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  dplyr::select(siret, enseigne1et) %>%
  dplyr::distinct()

iso <- iso %>%
  dplyr::left_join(ref_enseigne, by = "siret") %>%
  dplyr::distinct()
iso$minutes <- iso$time / 60

# Feature issue de test.Rmd pour la carte des isochrones.
feature_iso <- "Mediane_euro"
feature_iso_title <- "Revenu median (euros)"
if (!feature_iso %in% colnames(iris_grenoble)) {
  stop("Feature absente dans iris_grenoble: ", feature_iso)
}
```


```{r,message=FALSE, eval=otp_available}
tmap_mode("view")
tm_shape(iris_grenoble) +
  tm_polygons(
    col = feature_iso,
    alpha = 0.5,
    style = "pretty",
    id = "iris_name",
    title = feature_iso_title
  ) +
  tm_shape(sirene_grenoble) +
  tm_dots(
    "enseigne1et",
    legend.show = TRUE,
    title = "Enseigne",
    size = 0.1,
    id = "enseigne1et",
    popup.vars = "trancheeffe.2"
  ) +
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE) +
  tm_shape(iso) +
  tm_fill(
    "minutes",
    breaks = c(0, 6.01, 8.01, 10.01, 12.01),
    title = "Isochrones (minutes)",
    style = "fixed",
    labels = c("0 a 6", "6 a 8", "8 a 10", "10 a 12"),
    palette = "-BuPu",
    id = "minutes",
    alpha = 0.3
  ) +
  tm_borders()
```


```{r, eval=otp_available}
iso600 <- iso %>% filter(time == 600)

iris_grenoble$nb_supermarche_per_iris <- rowSums(
  ifelse(st_intersects(x = iris_grenoble, y = iso600, sparse = FALSE), 1, 0)
)

tm_shape(iris_grenoble) +
  tm_polygons(
    "nb_supermarche_per_iris",
    style = "pretty",
    id = "iris_name",
    labels = c("0", "1", "2", "3", "4", "5"),
    title = "Nb de Supermarches accessibles en 10 min"
  ) +
  tm_text(text = "iris_name", size = 0.8)
```


```{r, eval=otp_available}
data_temp <- matrix(0, nrow = nrow(iris_grenoble), ncol = nrow(iso600))
for (j in 1:nrow(iso600)) {
  for (i in 1:nrow(iris_grenoble)) {
    data_temp[i, j] <- as.character(st_intersects(iris_grenoble, iso600, sparse = FALSE)[i, j])
    data_temp[i, j] <- ifelse(data_temp[i, j] == "TRUE", iso600$enseigne1et[j], 0)
  }
}

data_temp2 <- matrix(0, nrow = nrow(data_temp), ncol = length(unique(iso600$enseigne1et)))
for (j in 1:length(unique(iso600$enseigne1et))) {
  data_temp2[, j] <- apply(
    data_temp,
    1,
    function(x) length(which(x == unique(iso600$enseigne1et)[j]))
  )
}

data_temp2 <- as.data.frame(data_temp2)
colnames(data_temp2) <- unique(iso600$enseigne1et)
write.csv(data_temp2, file.path(processed_dir, "nb_pdv_iris_iso10_2026.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```


```{r, eval=otp_available}
intersect_pct <- st_intersection(iris_grenoble, iso600) %>%
  mutate(intersect_area = st_area(.)) %>%
  dplyr::select(iris_name, intersect_area) %>%
  group_by(iris_name) %>%
  mutate(intersect_area = sum(intersect_area)) %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  unique()
```


```{r, eval=otp_available}
iris_grenoble <- mutate(iris_grenoble, iris_area = st_area(iris_grenoble))

iris_grenoble <- merge(iris_grenoble, intersect_pct, by = "iris_name", all.x = TRUE)

iris_grenoble <- iris_grenoble %>%
  mutate(intersect_area = ifelse(is.na(intersect_area), 0, intersect_area)) %>%
  mutate(couverture = as.numeric(intersect_area / iris_area) * 100)

tm_shape(iris_grenoble) +
  tm_polygons(
    fill = "couverture",
    fill_alpha = 0.5,
    fill.scale = tm_scale_continuous(),
    id = "iris_name",
    fill.legend = tm_legend(title = "Couverture (%)")
  ) +
  tm_text(text = "iris_name", size = 0.8) +
  tm_shape(sirene_grenoble) +
  tm_dots(
    fill = "enseigne1et",
    fill.legend = tm_legend(title = "Enseigne"),
    size = 0.1,
    id = "enseigne1et",
    popup.vars = "trancheeffe.2"
  ) +
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE)
```

```{r, eval=otp_available}
st_write(
  iris_grenoble,
  file.path(processed_dir, "iris_grenoble_iso10_2026.gpkg"),
  delete_dsn = TRUE
)
```
